name: job-swipe-automation
description: Automated job application system with Tinder-style swipe interface

scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend

author: Your Name
